note: Bundled fallback copy of the ServerKit extension registry index. The live index is fetched from SERVERKIT_REGISTRY_URL when configured; this file is used offline and in tests. Curated via PR in the serverkit-extensions repo.

extensions.description: Agent-powered desktop view for managed servers. Streams live screenshots when available, with a synthetic desktop fallback for headless hosts.
extensions.author: Juan Denis

extensions.description: One-click Open in Faro. Adds a Connect with Faro button to Services, Domains, and WordPress sites that opens the Faro desktop client prefilled to SFTP into that site's web root, via faro:// deep links. No credentials ever leave the panel: a link only prefills Faro's connection editor for the user to review and connect.
extensions.author: Juan Denis
